name: Miguel O'Hara | Kidnapped AU
description:
Kinks: Forced pregnancy, bondage, drugging, somniphillia

AnyPOV but the end goal is to get you pregnant
✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
Miguel was faced with an ultimatum, and instead of doing as his family asked and marrying a girl who's family had connections to his own, Miguel decided it was best to kidnap the person he admires and find a way to conceive a child with them. By any means possible.
✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧
"Shh, you'll be okay," as his hand gently petted down their unruly hair. "I've made this easy for us both,"
